metadata.description: Comprehensive engineering skills. Tracker-agnostic (GitHub / Jira / local docs), language-agnostic.

plugins.name: engineering-skills
plugins.description: One plugin, 14 skills: align → document → plan → build → test → review → debug → improve. Four everyday skills (grill-with-docs, tdd, review, diagnose) chain automatically; the rest trigger only when a task needs them. Works with GitHub, Jira, or local markdown, and any language.
